initiatives.name: Stop Cop City COS
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through collective organizing in Colorado Springs. They coordinate direct action support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective resistance against police militarization.

initiatives.name: Colorado Springs Prism Collective
initiatives.description: Prism Community Collective is a central hub and resource center for those impacted by the Club Q tragedy, including the greater LGBTQ+ community.

initiatives.name: COS Mutual Aid Union
initiatives.description: We distro food & clothes every Saturday in so-called Colorado Springs.
